candidates.theme: Meta Messaging Platform Consolidation — Instagram DM Encryption Removal Redirects Users to WhatsApp, Raising EU Regulatory Exposure
candidates.news_one_liner: Meta removes Instagram DM encryption and funnels users to WhatsApp, consolidating its messaging strategy but risking EU regulatory action under GDPR.

candidates.theme: Apple AI Product Litigation — Siri $250M Settlement Establishes Legal Precedent for AI Feature Misrepresentation Across Big Tech
candidates.news_one_liner: Apple's $250M Siri settlement creates a litigation blueprint threatening all big tech AI feature marketing claims, raising compliance costs sector-wide.
